x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Eligibility Criteria Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The set of conditions that customers, accounts, or partners must meet to qualify for an incentive.

Comment:
Examples
Minimum transaction amount (€100 purchase)
Maintaining a minimum balance (€5,000 savings)
Opening a new account
Using a credit card a certain number of times

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Threshold Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The minimum level of activity or performance required before an incentive becomes applicable.

Comment:
Examples

Spend €500 per month to qualify for cashback

Maintain €10,000 balance to earn bonus interest

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Calculation Method Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The rule that determines how the incentive value is calculated.

Comment:
Example: €200 transaction × 3% cashback = €6 reward.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Reward Type Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The form in which the incentive benefit is provided to the beneficiary.

Comment:
Examples
Cashback
Bonus interest
Loyalty points
Fee waiver
Discount or voucher

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Reward Limit Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
he maximum value of incentive that can be earned within a specific period.

Comment:
Examples
Maximum cashback €50 per month
Maximum loyalty points 10,000 per year

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Validity Period Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The time frame during which the incentive program is active.

Comment:
Example: Incentive valid from 1 January to 31 March.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Payout Frequency Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Specifies when the incentive is paid or credited.

Comment:
Example: Cashback credited at the end of each month.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Redemption Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Conditions governing how accumulated incentives can be used or redeemed.

Comment:
Examples
Minimum 1,000 points required for redemption
Points expire after 24 months
Cashback automatically credited

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Expiry Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Defines when unused rewards or points expire and become invalid.

Comment:
Example
Loyalty points expire after 12 months

Promotional cashback must be used within 90 days

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Participation Restriction Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Limits or exclusions determining who cannot participate in the incentive program.

Comment:
Examples
Employees excluded from promotional incentives

Incentive valid only for new customers

Incentive limited to specific product types
